title: Admin Executive
description:
Job Description & Requirements

Limitless is growing our administrative team to support our growing organisation, and are looking for an Administrative Executive to join and grow with us.

About the Charity

Limitless is a charity (IPC) that provides accessible mental health services, intervention, and outreach to youths in Singapore. It serves young people struggling from a range of mental health challenges ranging from distress to complex mental illnesses and suicidal ideation, providing easy access to care.

Job Responsibilities

1. Secretariat Support for Board and Committees

  • Coordinate scheduling and logistics for all Board and Committee meetings (online and in-person)

  • Support Board and Committeee level events, such as onboarding and AGM. This includes preparation of materials.

  • Prepare, compile, and distribute agendas, meeting papers, and background documents in advance

  • Attend meetings to take accurate minutes, capturing key decisions, actions, and next steps

  • Circulate minutes for review and approval, track follow-up actions, and ensure timely completion

  • Maintain up-to-date records of Board and Committee members, including contact details, terms of service, and committee assignments

2. Administrative Support to Senior Management Team

  • Manage calendars, and schedule meetings

  • Prepare data and documents, drafting correspondence, and preparing presentations

  • Digital filing of confidential documents for administrative, operational, and governance records

  • Support administrative and logistical tasks for events held

  • Support internal reviews and updates of governance policies, manuals, and procedures.

  • Communicate and co-ordinate with internal and external stakeholders of the Agency

3. Office Administration

  • Manage inventory of office supplies and equipment, placing orders as needed.

  • Support office operations and coordination of administrative affairs

  • Coordinate the maintenance and repairs of office equipment and facilities.

  • Other ad-hoc duties as assigned

Job Requirements

  • GCE ‘A’ Levels or Diploma in any discipline with at least 2 years’ relevant experience, Business Administration is preferred

  • Excellent time management skills and able to manage multi-task and meet tight deadlines

  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills

  • Dynamic, quick thinking, adaptable and responsive to change

  • A team player, analytical, meticulous, resourceful, with good interpersonal skills and strong verbal and written communication

  • Able to handle sensitive matters with a high level of confidentiality

  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Powerpoint)

  • Organizational and minutes taking skills

  • Secretarial experience will be advantageous

postedCompany.description:
Limitless is a non-profit organization that was founded with the vision of building hope and worth, empowering the next generation to live purpose driven lives, and to fulfil their potential in life. 


OUR GOAL 

To end powerlessness in youths, brought about by mental illness, poverty, and social exclusion. One life at a time. 


OUR WORK

 

Limitless primarily does one to one interventive work with

youths (aged 12 – 25) who struggle with their mental health

This is done through our helpline, and counselling & casework programs where our counsellors and social workers work to support youths who may be struggling with issues such as depression, anxiety disorders, or suicidality. In 2019, 237 youths sought help from Limitless, and in 2020 so far, there have been over 200 young people who’ve reached out for help. 


Limitless is also active in youth mental health outreach and public education work.
postedCompany.name: LIMITLESS (LTD.)
